title: Craft Piece!
description: A One Piece Mod made by Gaming2012 (Unofficial All Credits of idea to Eiichiro Oda)
body:
A One Piece Inspired Mod By Gaming2012, Find Strong Fruits with mystical abilities and swords with insane power.  This Mod is now in beta

Email me if you find bugs or you have a suggestion: rashad2012saeed@gmail.com

This mod adds Fruits with Strong Abilities and Swords too!

Mod was made with MCreator 1.20.1 Forge

Fruits: Gum.

Swords: Cutlass. Katana

(All Credit of Idea is for Eiirichiro Oda, If Mispelt the person im talking about the creator of One Piece)
